site.name: Kian Xu
site.pageTitle: Kian Xu | B2B Tech Product Sourcing Agent · Shenzhen
site.description: Kian Xu (许元凯) is a B2B tech product sourcing agent based in Shenzhen, China. Former engineering manager at Ping An Technology and S.F. International, and frontend lead at PLAUD. Connecting international buyers with China's hardware supply chain.

home.tagline: Merchant by day. Dad by evening. Builder by night.
home.bio1: I'm a <developerLink>B2B tech sourcing agent</developerLink> and developer based in Shenzhen. I led engineering teams at <pinganLink>Ping An Technology</pinganLink> and <sfLink>S.F. International</sfLink>, then led the frontend at <plaudLink>PLAUD</plaudLink>. Today I source hardware for international buyers.
home.bio2: I look for ideas where sensor tech, AI frontiers, and high-frequency niches meet what I can actually do, then push that last part a little further each time. One sharp idea wins. Ship it. PDCA. Repeat.
home.writingTitle: Some of my favorite writing includes:
home.footer: You can <blogLink>read my writing</blogLink> or explore my <projectsLink>projects</projectsLink>, or <followLink>follow me online</followLink>. <contactLink>Reach out</contactLink> if interested.

about.metaTitle: About Kian Xu — B2B Tech Sourcing Agent, Shenzhen
about.metaDescription: Kian Xu is a B2B tech product sourcing agent based in Shenzhen, China. Former engineering manager at Ping An Technology and S.F. International, and frontend lead at PLAUD. Specializing in hardware procurement for international buyers.
about.heading: About
about.intro: B2B tech sourcing agent in Shenzhen, bridging international buyers with China's hardware supply chain.
about.body1: I'm a B2B tech sourcing agent focused on sensors, IoT hardware, electronics, and consumer tech. Unlike a typical trading company, I bring an engineering background: a decade-plus leading frontend engineering teams, which means I can read spec sheets, evaluate BOMs, and negotiate directly with factory engineers.
about.body2: I built procurement platforms before I ran them. At Ping An Technology, I led the frontend engineering team on a pharmaceutical procurement system and food safety monitoring platform. At S.F. International, as Technical Manager for the overseas division, I delivered the Mobile Web product for international logistics. At PLAUD, I led the frontend engineering team across the SaaS and Shopify product lines.
about.body3: Today I work with B2B buyers in Europe and North America who need a trusted sourcing agent in Shenzhen for hardware and tech products. I handle supplier qualification, procurement, and factory communication end to end.
about.exp1Detail: Led the frontend engineering team. Core projects: enterprise pharmaceutical procurement platform and food safety monitoring platform.
about.exp2Detail: Led the frontend engineering team and served as Technical Manager for overseas projects. Delivered the Mobile Web product for international logistics ToC operations.
about.exp3Detail: Led the frontend engineering team across the SaaS product and Shopify storefront. Oversaw multiple concurrent product lines.
about.contactText: Looking for a reliable sourcing partner in Shenzhen for hardware, electronics, or tech products? I'd be glad to connect.
about.occupationDescription: Sourcing hardware and tech products for international B2B buyers from Chinese manufacturers in Shenzhen
